name: Steel
description: Open-source browser infrastructure API purpose-built for AI agents. Provides cloud browser sessions with CAPTCHA solving, proxy/fingerprinting controls, long-lived sessions, and SDK support for agentic web automation.
pricing: Free tier ($10 credits/month); paid plans from $29/month
notes: Steel explicitly markets itself as an open-source browser API for AI agents and publishes agent-specific integrations and cookbook examples for OpenAI, Claude, browser-use, Magnitude, and Notte.
